title: Set Intersection Size At Least Two

testcases.input: intervals = [[1,3],[3,7],[8,9]] Output: 5 Explanation: let nums = [2, 3, 4, 8, 9]. It can be shown that there cannot be any containing array of size 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: let nums = [2, 3, 4, 8, 9]. It can be shown that there cannot be any containing array of size 4.

testcases.input: intervals = [[1,3],[1,4],[2,5],[3,5]] Output: 3 Explanation: let nums = [2, 3, 4]. It can be shown that there cannot be any containing array of size 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: let nums = [2, 3, 4]. It can be shown that there cannot be any containing array of size 2.

testcases.input: intervals = [[1,2],[2,3],[2,4],[4,5]] Output: 5 Explanation: let nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]. It can be shown that there cannot be any containing array of size 4.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: let nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]. It can be shown that there cannot be any containing array of size 4.
